worlds.name: Pixar 3D Feature
worlds.formula: Premium 3D animated feature look (Pixar/DreamWorks tier), material-agnostic
worlds.render: Premium 3D animated feature frame at studio-feature fidelity: appealing rounded forms with clean readable silhouette, subsurface-soft skin and material response, multi-bounce global-illumination lighting with one warm motivated key, gentle depth-of-field, art-directed colour script, emotional staging, polished cinematic composition. Production-grade, never plasticky game-engine, never photoreal. 10-second motion arc: vibrant 3D world establishes → one character action or physics event with expressive weight → warm confident hold.
worlds.motion: weighted squash-and-stretch ease, one expressive anticipation, settle into a confident hold
worlds.best: warm emotional explainers, character-led lessons, broad family appeal
worlds.avoid: uncanny photorealism, flat cel, stiff game-engine CGI

worlds.name: Anime Cel (ufotable-grade)
worlds.formula: Premium Japanese cel animation with 3D-assisted FX and painterly BG
worlds.render: Premium anime cel frame at top-studio (ufotable/Kyoto-tier) fidelity: crisp cel shading with 2-3 clean value steps, expressive hand-drawn line, detailed painted background with atmospheric depth, dramatic rim and bloom, lens-flare accents, 3D-composited effects (water, flame, energy light) layered over 2D character and hand-painted background, single emotive character in mid-shot; golden-hour rim light separating them from the painted background, emotional golden-hour palette. 10-second motion arc: painted world holds → one emotionally charged action or revelation → elemental particle settle and warm hold. IP-safe original design — no copied characters.
worlds.motion: smear-frame impact then ease, effects-animation flourish, held dramatic beat
worlds.best: shonen energy, emotional action explainers, dramatic reveals
worlds.avoid: western cartoon proportions, photoreal, muddy shading

worlds.name: Arcane — Painterly 3D
worlds.formula: Fortiche-idiom painterly 3D: hand-painted texture over 3D form
worlds.render: Painterly 3D feature frame in the Fortiche idiom: hand-painted texture maps over 3D geometry with visible brush-stroke albedo, 2D-animated smoke and energy FX composited onto 3D bodies, one figure at the teal-ember boundary — heavy shadow mass behind, single ember accent isolating the decisive detail, chromatic rim light, deep teal-and-ember palette, heavy art-directed negative-space shadow, expressive non-photoreal skin, graphic ink accents along silhouette edges, gallery-grade gritty mood. 10-second motion arc: oppressive environment establishes → one charged emotional gesture or reveal → dramatic shadow aftermath hold. No photoreal CGI, no flat cel, no clean game-engine look.
worlds.motion: deliberate weighted move, painterly FX flourish, brooding final hold
worlds.best: gritty emotional drama, mature stylised storytelling, hero moments
worlds.avoid: clean photoreal CGI, flat cartoon, glossy plastic

worlds.name: Spider-Verse — Comic Motion
worlds.formula: Into-the-Spider-Verse idiom: comic-book print motion graphics
worlds.render: Graphic comic-motion frame in the Spider-Verse idiom: each frame compositionally complete as a comic panel — motion conveyed through bold ink motion lines, halftone Ben-Day energy bursts and impact freeze poses, visible CMYK mis-registration offset, bold ink outlines, screen-printed colour layer, onomatopoeia and motion-line graphics as design elements, painterly-graphic backgrounds with chromatic aberration, high-energy panel composition. 10-second motion arc: graphic panel-composition intro → one kinetic event with motion-line energy → graphic impact freeze hold. IP-safe original design — print-art-direction quality, not flat vector.
worlds.motion: stepped 2s-on-3s snap, graphic motion-shape trails, crisp pose-to-pose hold
worlds.best: kinetic pop energy, bold youth content, high-impact reveals
worlds.avoid: smooth photoreal interpolation, muted realism, plain flat color

worlds.name: Ghibli — Watercolor 2D
worlds.formula: Hand-drawn 2D with watercolor backgrounds and gentle naturalism
worlds.render: Hand-drawn 2D animation frame in the Ghibli idiom: soft watercolor and gouache painted backgrounds with atmospheric depth, gentle clean character line, naturalistic warm light, one small figure against a vast living landscape — environment in gentle continuous motion (grass bending, clouds drifting, water surface alive), figure in one slow deliberate intentional gesture, tender humane staging, nostalgic pastel-but-rich palette, hand-crafted warmth. 10-second motion arc: living environment establishes fully → figure makes one quiet deliberate gesture → world settles in gentle warmth. No 3D CGI, no harsh cel banding, no digital sheen.
worlds.motion: gentle natural drift, wind and breath, calm settle
worlds.best: calm nature/feeling-led lessons, wonder, slow emotional beats
worlds.avoid: 3D CGI, hard cel, neon digital color

worlds.name: Stop-Motion (Laika-grade)

worlds.render: Tactile stop-motion frame at Laika fidelity: real handcrafted miniature sets and puppets, visible fabric/clay/wood material grain and fingerprint imperfection in every still frame, shallow macro depth-of-field, moody practical key light, tangible physical material weight — every frame complete and photographable on its own, no smooth CGI finish. 10-second motion arc: miniature world establishes in full tactile detail → one deliberate physical action completes its full arc with natural weight and follow-through → setting holds as a photographable final frame. worlds.best: crafty tactile explainers, cozy handmade charm, wonder
worlds.avoid: smooth CGI interpolation, flat vector, photoreal live action

worlds.name: MAPPA — Cinematic Dark Anime
worlds.formula: MAPPA-studio high-detail dark cinematic anime with fluid motion and atmosphere
worlds.render: Premium cinematic anime frame at MAPPA-studio fidelity: high-detail character linework with expressive facial microanimation, heavy atmospheric background painting with volumetric haze and urban texture, motion force conveyed through atmospheric light trails, shadow blur and dark aftermath — one decisive motion event per shot, sharp value contrast (deep shadow masses, single bright accent cutting one face plane), desaturated gritty palette with selective color pops on emotional peaks, dynamic diagonal compositions. Dark, adult, technically uncompromising. Single figure at the tension center; key light isolates exactly one face plane from deep shadow. 10-second motion arc: oppressive still atmosphere → one explosive committed event → settling dark atmospheric aftermath hold. IP-safe original design — no copied characters.
worlds.motion: fluid complex motion arc with held smear frame at peak, atmospheric FX confirm the beat, brooding weight in the settle
worlds.best: dark action series energy, intense emotional confrontation, gritty drama, mature narrative
worlds.avoid: flat cheerful cel, clean Pixar warmth, pastel softness, western cartoon proportions

worlds.render: Clean high-fidelity action anime frame at Bones-studio caliber: precise expressive linework with clean ink outlines, smooth dynamic action choreography with weight and follow-through, clean decisive negative space between figure and background at the action peak — choreography always fully readable at full speed, rich warm shadows (3-value clean shading), detailed mechanical and elemental FX animation with crisp edges, strong emotive character expression, hand-painted background art with textural depth, warm amber-and-blue palette with one saturated accent on the action peak. 10-second motion arc: weight-loaded anticipation hold → one technically perfect motion event with full follow-through → confident settled landing. IP-safe original design — no copied characters.
worlds.motion: smooth choreographed action flow with clear anticipation, weight-driven follow-through, clean impact frame and settle
worlds.best: action-driven character moments, elemental/power FX reveals, dramatic emotional peaks with kinetic energy
worlds.avoid: muddy overlapping linework, photoreal, dark desaturated MAPPA palette, flat vector

worlds.render: Classic grand adventure anime frame in the Toei Animation idiom: bold clean ink outlines with expressive character proportions, highly saturated vibrant color palette (ocean blues, sun golds, bright primaries), one clear hero figure in primary full light, full-body silhouette against a vast open horizon, ocean or sky — figure-to-world scale always explicit and celebrated, dynamic exaggerated expressions and poses, strong graphic silhouette reads, punchy color-hold effects on impact beats, hand-painted cel-era background warmth. 10-second motion arc: vast horizon or open world reveals → hero rises or arrives into frame → triumphant arrival pose and warm color hold. Environment layers: volcanic mountain islands rising dramatically from turquoise tropical sea, sky island cloud kingdoms floating above brilliant blue, underwater palace architecture in fluorescent coral and bioluminescent creature light, ancient civilization ruins draped in tropical canopy vegetation, open ocean horizon stretching to impossible weather phenomena — waterspouts, eternal storms, becalmed seas of gold. Small wooden ship against enormous natural scale. Bold clean ink outlines with expressive exaggerated world proportions, highly saturated vibrant color palette throughout. Color script: saturated cobalt ocean, tropical jade green island canopy, brilliant gold sunlight, vivid sky blue expanse, deep coral pink reef, volcanic black-red cliff face — primaries pushed to joyful maximum. Epic scale compositions as the core grammar: tiny ship against massive natural phenomena, human figure dwarfed by world scale. Environment always celebrating freedom and the size of the world. 10-second arc: vast Grand Line world establishes in golden sun → one environmental spectacle or natural wonder reveals its scale → triumphant wide landscape hold.
worlds.motion: exaggerated bold anticipation, wide-angle environmental reveal, triumphant held landscape with sky and sea
worlds.best: adventure world reveals, epic scale storytelling, ocean journey, found-family warmth, exploration themes
worlds.avoid: Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Chopper, Robin, Franky, Brook likenesses; Straw Hat design; Jolly Roger; Thousand Sunny exact design; Devil Fruit visual effects from the series

worlds.name: Solo Leveling — Gate Hunter World
worlds.formula: Modern Korean city confronting supernatural Gates, dungeon interiors, shadow realm hierarchy, purple-black power atmosphere
worlds.render: Premium cinematic manhwa-adaptation anime frame at MAPPA/A-1 Pictures fidelity: modern Korean city confronting supernatural reality. Environment layers: contemporary urban street scene torn open by ominous Gate portals — oval rifts in spacetime radiating unstable violet energy against grey city sky; dungeon interior of carved stone corridors with glowing mana veins of purple-black energy and condensation fog; shadow realm of absolute darkness with spectral violet-white luminescence from hierarchy aura; high-rank hunter staging zones where power pressure manifests as visible atmospheric distortion and dark particle uplift. One lone hunter figure — low-angle heroic framing, silhouetted against Gate glow or shadow-realm spectral light. Color script: absolute deep purple-black shadow void, electric indigo-blue S-rank aura, ominous blood-red Gate core, cold steel-grey urban concrete base, spectral violet-white power atmosphere, cold platinum for highest-rank presence. Clean high-fidelity linework, smooth dark color fields, dramatic atmospheric lighting exclusively from supernatural sources, low ground fog in dungeon depth. 10-second arc: urban or dungeon environment fills with supernatural atmospheric pressure → one power awakening or Gate activation event releases energy → brooding held power-reveal frame.
worlds.motion: power awakening energy rise from ground, shadow depth expansion, rank-aura atmospheric pressure hold
worlds.best: power fantasy atmosphere, dungeon environment, urban supernatural, rank hierarchy visualization
worlds.avoid: Sung Jinwoo likeness; shadow army soldier specific designs; specific monster designs from the series; mana UI screens or game-HUD elements; specific dungeon boss designs

worlds.render: Premium cinematic anime frame at MAPPA top-studio fidelity: contemporary Japan invaded and transformed by cursed energy. Environment layers: modern urban spaces — schools, hospitals, warehouses, city streets — corrupted by black-purple cursed energy tendrils creeping from shadow edges; cursed spirit domain expansions of warped reality where spatial geometry distorts and the sky inverts to sickly black-green void; Hollow Purple technique environment where opposite-polarity energy spheres generate white-hot inverse flash consuming space; Tokyo Jujutsu High architecture at dusk with stone walls and cursed energy pressure. worlds.name: Attack on Titan — Wall Civilization World
worlds.formula: Humanity's last civilization behind 50-meter stone walls, desaturated military atmosphere, scale-dread compositions
worlds.render: Cinematic dark anime frame at WIT Studio/MAPPA fidelity: humanity's final civilization contained behind massive stone walls. Environment layers: Wall Maria/Rose/Sina exterior face — 50-meter sheer stone face against uniform grey sky, tiny patrol figure on the wall top for absolute scale reference; Wall Rose interior market streets of clay-tile rooftops, horse-cobblestone roads, smoke from chimneys, civilian daily life under military shadow; rolling green meadow stretching to the treeline 80 meters distant where something massive stirs; Survey Corps operational woodland with extreme vertical depth from treetop to forest floor; coastal cliff edges at the world boundary under dramatic cloud cover. Atmospheric desaturated color script throughout: dusty green-grey countryside, stone grey military architecture, dirty ochre earth road, olive-brown uniform tones, muted sky blue above oppressive grey cloud base, selective blood-red accent on threat markers. Compositions always emphasizing human smallness against colossal scale: figures on wall tops against sky, figures in meadow against treeline, vertical from cliff base to wall crown. Heavy military survival atmosphere, never adventure or hope. 10-second arc: vast wall world reveals its scale against grey sky → one scale event or vertical movement makes the dread concrete → atmospheric tension hold.
worlds.motion: vertical scale reveal, slow atmospheric establish, tension hold with natural wind and grass motion
worlds.best: survival tension atmosphere, monumental scale contrast, military world environment, human-vs-colossal storytelling
worlds.avoid: Titan creature designs; Eren, Mikasa, Armin, Levi likenesses; Survey Corps wing emblems; vertical maneuvering gear designs; specific Wall structure internal architecture

Environment layers: Hidden Leaf Village architecture — red-clay tile rooftops layered across mountain valley floor, stone training grounds with practice post fields at golden-hour light, carved stone cliff-face monuments overlooking the valley, ancient forest border of enormous trees with thick canopy above the village boundary; shinobi mission terrain of dense bamboo forest floor with filtered green light, rocky mountain passes at high altitude with wind-swept dust, open river valleys for training; night landscape under full moon with warm orange lantern glow from village windows below. Exuberant bold colors, clean ink outlines, highly readable compositions. Color script: golden-orange warmth (sunlight, determination), deep forest green and rich earth brown (nature, roots), dusty warm orange-red (training effort, dust trail), sky blue (hope, open sky), black-silver (shadow, steel). Pierrot Animation signature: clean bold ink lines, vibrant flat-cel color with modest shading, strongly readable silhouettes, chakra energy as swirling circle-arc motion paths in warm orange-blue. 10-second arc: shinobi world environment establishes in warm afternoon light → one training event or elemental chakra beat traces its arc → resolves in warm confident hold.
worlds.motion: circular chakra arc energy path, dust trail on sprint, warm determined hold
worlds.best: determination and growth themes, elemental energy visualization, village community world, training montage atmosphere

worlds.name: Bleach — Soul Society World
worlds.formula: Japanese afterlife Soul Society architecture, Tite Kubo high-contrast black-white palette, spiritual pressure atmosphere
worlds.render: Premium anime cel frame at elevated studio fidelity: Soul Society, the Japanese afterlife civilization. Environment layers: Seireitei — white stone castle walls encircling the inner court district with tiered Japanese pagoda architecture, stone-paved open plazas under vast blue sky that feels slightly too bright, the Rukongai outer district of labyrinthine alley-canal slums with weathered wood and paper lanterns; spiritual pressure zones where the sky darkens and stone cracks under hierarchical power compression; the deep spirit-world sub-spaces of pure black void where only spiritual energy light source exists — sword-pressure creates visible shock ring geometries through this void. Iconic black-and-white visual anchor: black Shinigami robes against white stone architecture creates the world's fundamental contrast ratio — soul orange accent energy charges against this pair. Color script: ink-black mass (robes, shadow), stark chalk-white (architecture, sky), soul orange-amber (spiritual energy, fire), dusty warm earth (Rukongai wood), vivid battle-sky blue (open Seireitei sky). High-contrast cel shading with clean decisive line, dramatic low-angle compositions for power architecture, open sky establishing the spiritual plane. 10-second arc: Soul Society architecture establishes in blue sky → one spiritual pressure event darkens and charges the atmosphere → contrast-held spiritual-world frame.

agents.name: Idea Generator
agents.summary: Chooses Production Path before scenario. Turns weak client briefs into routes, recommendation, scene architecture and MAMILAS handoff.

agents.name: Master Brief
agents.summary: Creates strict path-aware Final Brief, resolves path conflicts, protects Render Lock, source integrity, scene IDs and @tags.

agents.name: Image Director
agents.summary: Reads Production Path before World. Real path = photoreal/commercial/live-action frames. Animation path = tactile metaphor. Preserves @tags/logo/text.

agents.name: Motion Director
agents.summary: Pure motion only. Reads Production Path before camera. Real path = restrained filmic. Animation = material physics. 5-6s beat/split aware.

agents.name: Proof Director
agents.summary: Fails contamination, skipped IDs, weak render locks, text/logo risk, scene source loss, generic AI-video smell.

agents.name: Suno Music
agents.summary: Path-aware instrumental score, Custom Mode thinking, no vocals unless requested, VO-safe mix.

agents.name: Client Pitch
agents.summary: Turns Final Brief into client-facing concept rationale and approval text without exposing prompt mechanics.

golden.name: IMAGE · Product Hero · Nano Banana
golden.bad: A cinematic shot of a premium phone case, dramatic lighting, ultra realistic, 4K.
golden.why_bad: Generic. No geometry lock, logo/text rule, material behavior, lens, reflection, surface fidelity, start-frame stability.
golden.gold: Ultra-real premium commercial studio frame, exact product geometry locked, macro 100mm lens, clean black negative space, controlled gold rim light across aramid fiber texture, crisp edge highlights, realistic micro-scratches and weave depth, stable logo/packaging plane if present, shallow depth of field, product centered as hero object, no CGI plastic sheen, no warped text, no extra objects, frozen cinematic start frame ready for motion.

golden.name: IMAGE · Human Testimonial · Realism
golden.bad: A happy customer talking to camera in a nice office, cinematic.
golden.why_bad: Stock testimonial. No skin texture, eye-line, wardrobe fabric, practical light, human imperfection, location credibility.
golden.gold: Photoreal human portrait film frame, 50mm lens at eye height, natural skin texture with subtle pores and asymmetry, believable eye-line slightly off-camera, real wardrobe fabric with visible weave, soft practical key light from window left, muted office background with authentic depth, restrained color grade, human-scale framing, calm expression, no plastic skin, no fake smile, no beauty smoothing, frozen start frame.

golden.name: IMAGE · Education · Object-led
golden.bad: A Pixar classroom where kids learn about liquid measurements.
golden.why_bad: Too literal/classroom. No tactile metaphor, dominant lesson-object, motion hook.
golden.gold: Premium 3D Pixar-quality animated feature frame inside a handcrafted soft-clay learning world, one oversized transparent measuring beaker as the dominant lesson-object, warm classroom sunlight, tactile rounded materials, measurement marks physically engraved on a wooden base, liquid surface paused halfway with a visible light reflection ready to move, foreground clay droplets leading the eye, clean readable composition, no flat worksheet, no random labels, motion-ready start frame.

golden.name: MOTION · Product Hero · Kling 3.0
golden.bad: Camera zooms in while light sweeps over the phone case.
golden.why_bad: Lazy zoom. No parallax, no physical reflection choreography, no start/end discipline, no tail hold.
golden.gold: Low macro dolly slides once along the black tabletop, a blurred foreground edge giving parallax; as it arrives a single gold rim highlight travels once across the aramid weave and lands on the logo plane, which stays fixed and readable. Product geometry locked, no shape change. The move completes by ~5s into a three-quarter hero hold with clean negative space and a faint specular shimmer. Negative field: morphing, warping logo/text, changing product shape, extra objects, flicker. For more coverage add a second short beat instead of stretching this one.

golden.name: MOTION · Animation Education · Kling 3.0
golden.bad: The camera slowly pushes in and the objects glow.
golden.why_bad: Generic AI-video. No material/world physics, no educational reveal, no environment reaction, no final frame logic.
golden.gold: Child-eye push toward the clay lesson table; the liquid surface rises in ONE clean physical move and stops exactly at the engraved mark, a single warm highlight settling on the glass. Beaker geometry, table, engraved text and the characters stay fixed; one clay droplet wobbles once from the motion. Main event done by ~5s, then a stable three-quarter final hold with the level locked at the mark. Negative field: morphing, warping engraved text, changing faces, opening mouths, extra liquid, flicker. This beat completes well within Kling 3.0's 10s window — for more VO coverage, chain a second approved beat rather than stretching this one.

golden.name: MOTION · Documentary Civic · Kling 3.0
golden.bad: Drone shot of the city with cinematic music and people smiling.
golden.why_bad: Stock civic montage. No human scale, no motivated camera, no authentic public texture.
golden.gold: Handheld micro-drift begins at child height beside a real sidewalk, following the chalk line as pedestrians pass naturally in soft background parallax. The camera does not fly; it moves like a documentary operator walking slowly, letting practical morning light reveal the civic texture of paving stones, storefront glass and passing shadows. by the late beat the line leads into a modest public square where children’s movement creates the reveal. Final hold: stable human-scale frame, no politician hero shot, no stock crowd, no artificial glow.

golden.name: SUNO · Documentary / Corporate · v5.5
golden.bad: Epic inspiring cinematic music with emotional vocals.
golden.why_bad: Too trailer-like and vocals fight voice-over.
golden.gold: Narration-safe instrumental documentary score, 82 BPM, soft felt piano pulse, restrained warm strings, low sub texture, subtle brushed percussion, no vocals, no lead melody during dialogue, gentle rise at midpoint, final warm resolve, clean mix with voice-over space, custom mode style layers: documentary, civic warmth, restrained cinematic, human scale.

golden.name: SUNO · Education · v5.5
golden.bad: Happy fun cheerful uplifting kids learning music.
golden.why_bad: Mood-filler. No named instruments, no bpm/groove, no VO pocket, no scene-mapped arc — Suno drifts.
golden.gold: Narration-safe instrumental education motif, 96 BPM light swing, felted celesta lead with a marimba answer, pizzicato string pulse, one soft clarinet, gentle shaker (no kick clipping the VO); clear midrange pocket left open for the narration VO and ducked under dialogue; intro one curious celesta phrase, build adds marimba and pizzicato at the concept reveal, one small peak on the transformation beat, warm resolve on a single held celesta note. Custom mode style layers: children's education, warm, curious, tactile, hummable. Exclude: vocals, lyrics, big drums, EDM drops, trailer brass, busy percussion.

golden.name: SUNO · Product Hero · v5.5
golden.bad: Luxury epic premium powerful emotional product music.
golden.why_bad: Trailer cliché. No instruments, no bpm, no space, no designed reveal sound, fights the VO.
golden.gold: Narration-safe premium product bed, 84 BPM, muted felt-piano pulse over a low sub-bass foundation, one designed signature synth tone reserved only for the product reveal, wide clean room; midrange pocket kept open for VO and ducked under dialogue; intro sparse pulse, build adds the sub at the macro pass, a single signature hit lands on the logo/reveal beat, clean resolve on one sustained low note. Custom mode style layers: premium commercial, restrained, confident, modern, spacious. Exclude: vocals, busy percussion clipping the VO, trailer brass, genre drift.

golden.bad: A Zelda and Elden Ring inspired fantasy world with a hero.

golden.gold: Original open-air mythic adventure frame: soft cel-shaded green-gold landscape meets decayed gothic ruin scale, low sun cutting through fogged stone arches, tiny original child explorer silhouette for scale, ancient-tech glow embedded in broken masonry, wide 24mm lens, clear foreground grass motion hook, no Link/Tarnished likeness, no Triforce, no armor/logo/weapon copy, IP-safe synthesis of exploration mood and mythic ruin gravity.

regression.name: Real Path Contamination
regression.input: Ultra Real Commercial + clay diorama + Pixar render lock
regression.expected: FAIL: real path cannot inherit clay/Pixar/diorama unless hybrid override is active.

regression.name: Source Loss
regression.input: Raw source 1200 chars, scene source 980 chars
regression.expected: FAIL: coverage below 100%; return to Lossless Ingest.

regression.name: Logo/Text Morph Risk
regression.input: Product hero with logo visible + motion prompt moves surface aggressively
regression.expected: FIX: freeze logo/text plane; only camera/light/reflection moves.

regression.name: Lazy Motion
regression.input: Camera slowly zooms in, lights glow, cinematic
regression.expected: FIX: add motivated camera arc, physical action, environment reaction, final tail hold.

regression.name: IP Reference Misuse
regression.input: Make it look like Luffy on the Thousand Sunny
regression.expected: FAIL/FIX: abstract into sunny ocean adventure, ship-deck scale, bold primaries; no Luffy/Sunny copy.

regression.name: Concept Monotony
regression.input: Brief with many CONCEPT lines but few unique subjects
regression.expected: FIX: too many scenes reuse the same concept; group source into thematic beats or deepen the concept bank.

regression.name: Fallback Leak
regression.input: Brief where multiple scenes use generic fallback concept templates
regression.expected: FAIL: generic fallback concepts repeated; expand EDU_SOURCE_BANK patterns or re-ingest source.
